smg.text: Very hot. Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers. Force 4 to 5 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Showers will become more frequent later.A few thunderstorms later. Force 5 to 6 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers, heavy at times. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 4 to 6 south to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Showers. Occasional thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 southerly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds.
